Ingredients: Cyclomethicone, Dimethiconol, Argania Spinosa Kernel Oil, Crambe Abyssinica Seed Oil, Brassica Campestris (Rapeseed) Seed Oil, Benzyl Alcohol, Benzyl Salicylate, Citronellol, Hexamethylindanopyran, Hexyl Cinnamal, Limonene, Vanillin, Parfum/Fragrance
Ingredients: Cyclomethicone, Dimethiconol, Argania Spinosa Kernel Oil, Crambe Abyssinica Seed Oil, Brassica Campestris (Rapeseed) Seed Oil, Benzyl Alcohol, Benzyl Salicylate, Citronellol, Hexamethylindanopyran, Hexyl Cinnamal, Limonene, Vanillin, Parfum/Fragrance
